title: Frontiers in Psychology
scope: Frontiers in Psychology is the world's most-cited psychology journal, covering all aspects of psychology including cognitive psychology, social psychology, developmental psychology, clinical psychology, and psychological methodology. The journal publishes research on human behavior, mental processes, and psychological interventions.
keywords: ["cognitive psychology","social psychology","developmental psychology","clinical psychology","behavioral research","mental health","psychological assessment","therapy","personality","emotion"]
description: Comprehensive psychology journal covering all areas of psychological science and practice.

title: Frontiers in Public Health
scope: Frontiers in Public Health addresses population health challenges through epidemiology, health policy, environmental health, occupational health, and global health research. The journal publishes studies on disease prevention, health promotion, and health systems.
keywords: ["epidemiology","health policy","disease prevention","health promotion","environmental health","occupational health","global health","population health","health systems","public health intervention"]
description: Leading public health journal focusing on population health and prevention strategies.

title: Frontiers in Environmental Science
scope: Frontiers in Environmental Science addresses environmental challenges through interdisciplinary research covering climate change, pollution, ecosystem dynamics, conservation, and sustainable development. The journal publishes research on environmental processes and human-environment interactions.
description: Interdisciplinary environmental journal addressing global environmental challenges.

title: Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology
scope: Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology covers the application of engineering principles to biological systems, including tissue engineering, biomaterials, biomedical devices, synthetic biology, and biotechnology applications in medicine and industry.
description: Interdisciplinary journal at the intersection of engineering, biology, and medicine.

title: Frontiers in Plant Science
scope: Frontiers in Plant Science publishes research on all aspects of plant biology, including plant physiology, molecular biology, genetics, ecology, evolution, and biotechnology. The journal covers both fundamental plant science and applications in agriculture and biotechnology.
keywords: ["plant physiology","plant genetics","plant molecular biology","plant ecology","plant evolution","crop science","plant biotechnology","photosynthesis","plant development","plant stress"]
description: Premier plant science journal publishing innovative research across all plant disciplines.

title: Frontiers in Genetics
scope: Frontiers in Genetics publishes research in all areas of genetics, including molecular genetics, population genetics, evolutionary genetics, genomics, bioinformatics, and genetic medicine. The journal covers both fundamental and applied genetic research.
description: Comprehensive genetics journal covering molecular to population-level genetic research.

title: Frontiers in Medicine
scope: Frontiers in Medicine publishes high-quality research across all medical disciplines, including internal medicine, surgery, pediatrics, oncology, cardiology, and emergency medicine. The journal focuses on clinical research, translational medicine, and medical innovation.
description: Premier medical journal publishing innovative research across all clinical disciplines.

title: Frontiers in Neuroscience
scope: Frontiers in Neuroscience publishes rigorously peer-reviewed research across all aspects of neuroscience, from molecular and cellular mechanisms to cognitive functions and neurological disorders. The journal covers neuroanatomy, neurophysiology, behavioral neuroscience, computational neuroscience, and translational research.
description: Leading interdisciplinary journal publishing cutting-edge neuroscience research from molecules to behavior.

title: Frontiers in Microbiology
scope: Frontiers in Microbiology covers all aspects of microbiology, including bacteriology, virology, mycology, parasitology, microbial ecology, and infectious diseases. The journal publishes research on microorganisms and their interactions with hosts and environments.
description: Leading microbiology journal covering all aspects of microbial life and their impacts.

title: Frontiers in Computer Science
scope: Frontiers in Computer Science publishes research across all areas of computer science, including artificial intelligence, machine learning, algorithms, software engineering, computer vision, natural language processing, and human-computer interaction.
keywords: ["artificial intelligence","machine learning","algorithms","software engineering","computer vision","natural language processing","human-computer interaction","cybersecurity","data science","computational complexity"]
description: Comprehensive computer science journal covering AI, algorithms, and computing applications.
